laws.obligation: Actor mailboxes preserve sender-to-receiver FIFO without promising global sender order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Actor mailboxes preserve sender-to-receiver FIFO without promising global sender order.

laws.obligation: Preserve FIFO message order within one sender/receiver channel under the minimum mailbox profile.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Preserve FIFO message order within one sender/receiver channel under the minimum mailbox profile.

laws.obligation: Complete RHS before dropping and replacing the old place value.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Complete RHS before dropping and replacing the old place value.

laws.obligation: Preserve callable lifetime, call-right, environment, and behavior responsibility across type checking, API digest, and lowering.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Preserve callable lifetime, call-right, environment, and behavior responsibility across type checking, API digest, and lowering.

laws.obligation: Cancellation is cooperative and never bypasses lexical cleanup.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Cancellation is cooperative and never bypasses lexical cleanup.

laws.obligation: Invoke def#cleanup exactly once for initialized non-moved state, never by direct call, while preserving primary and suppressed failure order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Invoke def#cleanup exactly once for initialized non-moved state, never by direct call, while preserving primary and suppressed failure order.

laws.obligation: Initialize construction fields in row/source order and roll back completed fields in reverse order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Initialize construction fields in row/source order and roll back completed fields in reverse order.

laws.obligation: Activate dynamic unit conversion through stdlib/provider profile, provider identity and complete policy; never through a source Preview gate.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Activate dynamic unit conversion through stdlib/provider profile, provider identity and complete policy; never through a source Preview gate.

laws.obligation: Select exactly one admitted entry and project host status only after cleanup.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Select exactly one admitted entry and project host status only after cleanup.

laws.obligation: Evaluate subexpressions exactly once in source order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate subexpressions exactly once in source order.

laws.obligation: Resolve a root conformance evidence selector to exactly one visible coherent nominal conformance without constructing a first-class witness value.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Resolve a root conformance evidence selector to exactly one visible coherent nominal conformance without constructing a first-class witness value.

laws.obligation: Retain the first escaping failure and append cleanup failures in execution order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Retain the first escaping failure and append cleanup failures in execution order.

laws.obligation: Evaluate every guard left-to-right once before ownership commit or payload evaluation; a false guard evaluates no payload.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate every guard left-to-right once before ownership commit or payload evaluation; a false guard evaluates no payload.

laws.obligation: Reject a physical line break between # and a role word while admitting only same-line horizontal trivia.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Reject a physical line break between # and a role word while admitting only same-line horizontal trivia.

laws.obligation: Evaluate library static lets in deterministic dependency order and commit each once.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate library static lets in deterministic dependency order and commit each once.

laws.obligation: Insert at most one outer some only for an independently fixed local target.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Insert at most one outer some only for an independently fixed local target.

laws.obligation: A multi-statement local value body produces a value with local ret on every reachable normal path.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: A multi-statement local value body produces a value with local ret on every reachable normal path.

laws.obligation: Only the final loop transfer target executes and observes its outcome handler after intermediate cleanup.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Only the final loop transfer target executes and observes its outcome handler after intermediate cleanup.

laws.obligation: Keep declaration-side *** collection distinct from call-side ** named unfolding in parsing, typing, and API residue.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Keep declaration-side *** collection distinct from call-side ** named unfolding in parsing, typing, and API residue.

laws.obligation: NumericArray operations preserve source evaluation order, shape checks, and explicit allocation/authority effects.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: NumericArray operations preserve source evaluation order, shape checks, and explicit allocation/authority effects.

laws.obligation: Numeric operations follow their declared checked/static responsibility without hidden widening.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Numeric operations follow their declared checked/static responsibility without hidden widening.

laws.obligation: Evaluate Option coalescing lhs once and rhs only for none.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate Option coalescing lhs once and rhs only for none.

laws.obligation: Evaluate the Option coalescing fallback only when the left operand is none.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate the Option coalescing fallback only when the left operand is none.

laws.obligation: Evaluate a projection source once and project in target-row order under declared ownership.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Evaluate a projection source once and project in target-row order under declared ownership.

laws.obligation: Raw String Phase A preserves exact body scalars and performs no escape or interpolation interpretation.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Raw String Phase A preserves exact body scalars and performs no escape or interpolation interpretation.

laws.obligation: Normalize rightward local binding to ordinary let/var before semantic AST/HIR and MIR; evaluate once and commit only after success.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Normalize rightward local binding to ordinary let/var before semantic AST/HIR and MIR; evaluate once and commit only after success.

laws.obligation: A task scope joins or cancels all owned children before exit.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: A task scope joins or cancels all owned children before exit.

laws.obligation: Drop full-expression temporaries in reverse completion order.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Drop full-expression temporaries in reverse completion order.

laws.obligation: Normalize unit dimensions and rational scale exactly before equality or conversion.

normalized_semantic_form.normalized_obligation: Normalize unit dimensions and rational scale exactly before equality or conversion.

digest_canonicalization: SHA-256 over canonical UTF-8 JSON of laws sorted in catalog order with object keys sorted and no insignificant whitespace
mutation_policy: each normalized law has a reversal plus a coordinated same-wrong attack; changing a ratified law requires a new decision id and detached trust anchor
